title: Communauté de communes Pays Fort Sancerrois Val de Loire
summary: The Communauté de communes Pays Fort Sancerrois Val de Loire is a communauté de communes, an intercommunal structure, in the Cher department, in the Centre-Val de Loire region, central France. It was created in January 2017 by the merger of the former communautés de communes Cœur du Pays Fort, Haut-Berry - Val de Loire and  Sancerrois. Its area is 688.0 km2, and its population was 18,476 in 2018. Its seat is in Sancerre.
text:
The Communauté de communes Pays Fort Sancerrois Val de Loire is a communauté de communes, an intercommunal structure, in the Cher department, in the Centre-Val de Loire region, central France. It was created in January 2017 by the merger of the former communautés de communes Cœur du Pays Fort, Haut-Berry - Val de Loire and  Sancerrois. Its area is 688.0 km2, and its population was 18,476 in 2018. Its seat is in Sancerre.
